mapper.select: SELECT gmd.id, gmd.academic_year, gmd.major_direction_id, md.direction_name, md.direction_code, m.id as major_id, m.major_name, m.major_code, m.org_unit_id, md.level, md.years, md.is_segmented, md.phase1_level, md.phase1_years, md.phase2_level, md.phase2_years, gmd.remarks FROM grade_major_directions gmd LEFT JOIN major_directions md ON gmd.major_direction_id = md.id AND md.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN majors m ON md.major_id = m.id AND m.deleted = 0 WHERE gmd.deleted = 0 AND gmd.academic_year = #{academicYear} ORDER BY m.major_name, md.direction_name

SELECT gmd.id, gmd.academic_year, gmd.major_direction_id, gmd.remarks, gmd.created_at FROM grade_major_directions gmd WHERE gmd.deleted = 0 AND gmd.major_direction_id = #{majorDirectionId} ORDER BY gmd.academic_year DESC

SELECT gmd.id, gmd.academic_year, gmd.major_direction_id, md.direction_name, m.major_name, md.level, md.years, gmd.remarks, gmd.created_at, gmd.updated_at, gmd.created_by, gmd.updated_by FROM grade_major_directions gmd LEFT JOIN major_directions md ON gmd.major_direction_id = md.id AND md.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN majors m ON md.major_id = m.id AND m.deleted = 0 WHERE gmd.id = #{id} AND gmd.deleted = 0

SELECT gmd.id, gmd.academic_year, gmd.major_direction_id, md.direction_name, m.major_name, gmd.remarks FROM grade_major_directions gmd LEFT JOIN major_directions md ON gmd.major_direction_id = md.id AND md.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN majors m ON md.major_id = m.id AND m.deleted = 0 WHERE gmd.deleted = 0 AND gmd.academic_year = #{academicYear} AND gmd.major_direction_id = #{majorDirectionId}
